message:
chore(audit): batch 535 — deep review of 40+ agent commits, all SOUND

Reviewed blocking pool, FIFO-fair mutex, SCRAM timing, transaction
cancel-correctness, gRPC buffer cap, request smuggling prevention,
alternating waker dedup, remote lifecycle, EXP3 weight overflow,
evidence sign fix, DNS allocation cap, TLS root-cert enforcement,
buffer close wakeup, session send cancel propagation, and more.

Systematic sweeps: zero dangerous truncation casts, zero production
unwraps, zero lost wakeup bugs across all channel/sync/service/stream
modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
